name: @paperclipai/desktop
description: Local macOS desktop shell for Paperclip.
author: Paperclip

scripts.package: pnpm run build && node ./scripts/stage-server-runtime.mjs && pnpm run verify-package-ui -- staged && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs package
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && node ./scripts/stage-server-runtime.mjs && pnpm run verify-package-ui -- staged && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs dist
